fields.label: Introduction
fields.value: Hyperspace CMS is a modern content management system built for developers who want the flexibility of code with the convenience of a CMS. Every change is tracked in Git, making it perfect for teams who value version control.

fields.label: Mission Statement
fields.value: To provide developers with a powerful, flexible content management system that doesn't compromise on simplicity or control. We believe in keeping content close to code, version controlled, and easily deployable.

fields.label: Features Description
fields.value: Git-based version control • No database required • Admin dashboard • Dynamic content fields • Image uploads • Real-time preview • TypeScript support • Built with SvelteKit
